title: GW170817 / vestigial-graviton
notes: Phase 7b sub-wave 7b.0 initial lift: paper25_gravitational_waves → L1 PRL splash, 3 pages. Both L1 and paper25 updated to current counts. All 10 cited bibitems pre-cached/textbook-exempt per CHECK 21. Stage 13 adversarial review pending.
